$comment: SHARED project containment for Claude Code — committed so every contributor who installs this repo gets the same rules. Machine-specific bits (absolute paths, personal allow-list) belong in the gitignored .claude/settings.local.json. See docs/repo-layout.md and docs/agent-containment.md. NOTE: the PreToolUse hooks auto-run scripts/hooks/*.py for everyone who opens this repo in Claude Code (in-repo, reviewable, path-guard only).
